# Shark Branding Solutions
> AI visibility and GEO consulting firm in Tampa Bay, FL. Founded by Michelle Stanaland. Helps local businesses rank in AI-powered search (ChatGPT, Google AI Overviews, Perplexity) through structured data, entity clarity, trust signals, and answer-ready page structure.

Shark Branding Solutions is a Florida AI visibility and local SEO consultancy. The company helps local businesses improve Google Business Profile performance, local search visibility, structured data, reputation signals, and website conversion.

## Entity
- Business name: Shark Branding Solutions
- Founder and CEO: Michelle Stanaland (formerly Michelle Frome)
- Chief Technology Officer: Josh Stanaland — https://www.linkedin.com/in/joshua-stanaland-574848358/ — AI application developer with a strong background in artificial intelligence, large language models (LLMs), and AI visibility strategy
- Website: https://www.sharkbrandingsolutions.com
- Phone: (727) 855-6505
- Email: info@sharkbrandingsolutions.com
- Address: 7901 4th St N Suite 300, St. Petersburg, FL 33702
- Service area: Tampa Bay, Tampa, Wesley Chapel, Lutz, Land O' Lakes, St. Petersburg, and surrounding Florida markets
- Community relationship: North Tampa Bay Chamber partner

## Services
- AI visibility consulting
- Generative engine optimization (GEO)
- Local SEO audits
- Google Business Profile optimization
- Structured data and entity optimization
- Reputation and trust signal strategy
- Buyer-intent messaging and landing page conversion
- Executive workshops on AI search and local discovery

## Authority Signals
- Michelle Stanaland was named a Top 15 Marketing Expert in Tampa Bay by Influence Digest in 2024 and 2025.
- Nominated for 2025 Executive of the Year Awards.
- Featured growth strategist and partner with the North Tampa Bay Chamber of Commerce.
- Press coverage via PRWeb; additional coverage available on request.
- Shark Branding Solutions publishes local AI visibility and SEO case studies including HVAC, real estate, and chamber case studies.
- Shark Branding Solutions focuses on AI visibility, local SEO, reputation, and conversion strategy for local businesses.

## Schema Markup Present
The following Schema.org types are implemented site-wide:
- ProfessionalService — organization details, address, phone
- Person — Michelle Stanaland, Founder/CEO with jobTitle
- WebSite — with SearchAction
- WebPage — per-page implementation
- Article — on blog/guide pages with datePublished
- FAQPage — on service and content pages
- BreadcrumbList — navigation structure
- Review — client testimonial (Jonathan Tuttle)
- Service — with areaServed fields
- PodcastEpisode — Chamber podcast appearance

## AI Crawler Access
All major AI search crawlers are explicitly allowed in robots.txt:
GPTBot, ChatGPT-User, OAI-SearchBot (OpenAI), ClaudeBot, anthropic-ai (Anthropic), PerplexityBot, Google-Extended, Bingbot, Applebot, meta-externalagent.

## Social Profiles
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/shark-branding-solutions
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/sharkbrandingsolutions
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/sharkbrandingsolutions/
- X: https://x.com/sharkbranding

## Crawler Guidance
Public marketing pages may be crawled by search engines and AI systems. For crawler rules, see:
- https://www.sharkbrandingsolutions.com/robots.txt
- https://www.sharkbrandingsolutions.com/sitemap.xml
